style_effects: Flickering translucent violet aura with slow-drifting mist particles that twist like smoke around Meowth's form, casting elongated, bending shadows that ripple unnaturally in the air. Cold blue-white ghost luminescence pulses through its translucent body, casting eerie, distorted reflections on nearby surfaces with a soft, ethereal glow. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
